text:
Server Update Announcement - 7/02
2026/07/01
Hi there,
A non-disruptive global server update is planned for 7/02 at 00:00-01:00 (UTC+-0).

Update Content
1. New Cosmic Cravings skins are here!
2. The Honor Pass has been updated with all-new Honor Pass skins.
3. Hero Balance Adjustments:
a) Stats Buffed: Lady Sun, Lu Bu, Lam, Shi, Menki
b) Stats Adjusted: Sun Bin, Liu Bei, Florentino

Hero Balance Adjustments
Lady Sun
Stats Buffed - Increased skill damage
Skill 2: Frag Grenade
Base Damage: Before: 380 (+76 per skill level) (+100% extra Physical Attack) Now: 380 (+76 per skill level) (+120% extra Physical Attack)
Ultimate: Ultimate Shell
Base Damage: Before: 840 (+420 per skill level) (+210% extra Physical Attack) Now: 840 (+420 per skill level) (+250% extra Physical Attack)

Lu Bu
Stats Buffed - Increased skill damage
Passive: Bloodthirsty Ancestry
Physical Pierce of Basic Attacks and Skills When Unenhanced: Before: 30% Now: 35%
Skill 1: Crescent Halberd
Base Damage: Before: 570 (+114 per skill level) (+220% extra Physical Attack) Now: 600 (+120 per skill level) (+200% extra Physical Attack)

Sun Bin
Stats Adjusted - Adjusted skill effect
Skill 2: Time Flux
Cooldown: Before: 11s (-0.4s per skill level) Now: 12.5s (-0.5 per skill level)

Liu Bei
Stats Adjusted - Adjusted skill effect
Skill 1: Dual Shot
Base Damage: Before: 130 (+26 per skill level) (+25% Physical Attack) Now: 110 (+22 per skill level) (+22% Physical Attack)

Florentino
Stat Adjustments - Adjusted Skill Damage
Skill 2: Triple Threat
Base Damage: Before: 140 (+28 per skill level) (+45% extra Physical Attack) Now: 130 (+26 per skill level) (+40% extra Physical Attack)
